title: [InstCombine] Mark select in fdiv transforms with unknown profile
author: boomanaiden154
patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSimplifyDemanded.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSimplifyDemanded.cpp
index 899b52fdc951b..c9d16f08ae117 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSimplifyDemanded.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSimplifyDemanded.cpp
@@ -2533,11 +2533,11 @@ Value *InstCombinerImpl::SimplifyDemandedUseFPClass(Instruction *I,
 
       Value *IsInfOrZeroOrNan = Builder.CreateOr(IsInfOrNan, IsZeroOrNan);
 
-      return Builder.CreateSelectFMF(
+      return Builder.CreateSelectFMFWithUnknownProfile(
           IsInfOrZeroOrNan, ConstantFP::getQNaN(VTy),
           ConstantFP::get(
               VTy, APFloat::getOne(VTy->getScalarType()->getFltSemantics())),
-          FMF);
+          FMF, DEBUG_TYPE);
     }
 
     Type *EltTy = VTy->getScalarType();
diff --git a/llvm/utils/profcheck-xfail.txt b/llvm/utils/profcheck-xfail.txt
index f3e986a784512..8d381bbc3c152 100644
--- a/llvm/utils/profcheck-xfail.txt
+++ b/llvm/utils/profcheck-xfail.txt
@@ -302,7 +302,6 @@ Transforms/InstCombine/select-of-symmetric-selects.ll
 Transforms/InstCombine/select-select.ll
 Transforms/InstCombine/shift.ll
 Transforms/InstCombine/simplify-demanded-fpclass.ll
-Transforms/InstCombine/simplify-demanded-fpclass-fdiv.ll
 Transforms/InstCombine/sink-not-into-another-hand-of-logical-and.ll
 Transforms/InstCombine/sink-not-into-another-hand-of-logical-or.ll
 Transforms/InstCombine/strchr-1.ll
description: As part of the profcheck effort we are trying to explicitly annotate select instructions where we cannot reasonably synthesize profile information as having an unknown profile. This does that for the case introduced in 0993d69bc35cfdd4f3a904a603701e66906e8987.

comments.author: boomanaiden154
comments.body: It might not be unreasonable to bias towards the values not being special FP values, but that might also pessimize some cases without value profile information.

comments.author: boomanaiden154
comments.body:
> Missing regen of test checks? I assume this is one of those annoying append only cases where the test passes but changed

Added. This is a no-op if the function does not have a profile entry count, and given this is really only an annotation/would still be caught by the profcheck build, I left out a test, but definitely doesn't hurt to have one in the default configuration.
